name: Hearty Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Oil a 10-inch cast iron skillet and place it in the oven to preheat.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the cornmeal, baking soda, pepper, and basil.
4. In another bowl, mix together the butter, eggs (if needed), corn, sour cream, garlic, onion, mozzarella, and tomatoes.
5. Make a well in the center of the cornmeal mixture.
6. Pour in the egg mixture.
7. Stir just enough to combine.
8. Pour the batter into the preheated skillet.
9. Bake for 50-60 minutes, until the bread is golden and fairly firm, but not hard.
10. Serve warm.
